description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the blang/latex Docker image and runs a global before_script that updates apt, installs biber and wget, downloads the LinLibertine 5.3.0 font archive and the Fira 4.202 font archive, extracts them into /usr/share/fonts/truetype and /usr/share/fonts/opentype/fira-sans respectively, and refreshes the font cache with fc-cache. Define a single stage named build. In the build stage add a latex job that executes the script command docs/build.sh. Configure the latex job to publish the contents of docs/build/* as build artifacts.
